name: urban_policy_procurement_shortcut_cedar_car_fair
premise: A vendor outage and an internal change window collided; rollback paths are not symmetric and both teams blame the other. In Urban Policy, the situation tagged internally around urban policy procurement shortcut cedar car fair has converged with local pressure in the Marrowbridge corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A downstream jurisdiction will copy whatever is decided here verbatim into its own emergency order within hours. Middle management filtered an escalation; the executive on point is hearing some details for the first time on this bridge. A hard operational cutoff hits in under twenty minutes unless a named executive posts a decision in the command log. No option cleanly satisfies both care and fairness; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Harper Dubois
agents.identity: I am Harper Dubois, the duty officer with sign-off authority for the next window in Urban Policy. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat fairness as disposable collateral every time care spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Priya Chandra
agents.identity: I am Priya Chandra, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Urban Policy. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so care cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes fairness in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will insist on verified facts before external commitments, split comms into facts versus hypotheses, and accept delay cost to protect integrity aligned with fairness.
I will align public messaging with operational necessity now and correct later if needed—accepting reputational and trust risk to fairness to preserve operational care.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The next irreversible system or legal step is imminent. Harper Dubois must choose under care versus fairness. What does Harper Dubois do?
